response.justification: While Bogdan has the minimum 15 years of software engineering experience and a strong entrepreneurial background, he lacks the deep, recognized AI expertise and Director-level strategic advisory experience required for this Principal AI Strategy role. His AI experience appears limited to very recent infrastructure work, missing the preferred advanced degree and extensive AI-powered product development history.
strengths: Meets the minimum requirement of 15+ years of software engineering experience across various stacks.
Demonstrates strong entrepreneurial and innovation experience as the Founder of GISCollective.
Possesses solid cloud infrastructure and modern development skills, including AWS, Kubernetes, and microservices.
concerns: Lacks the recognized, deep AI/ML expertise and strategic advisory experience expected of a Director-level Principal Engineer.
Does not hold a preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
AI-specific experience is limited to very recent tooling work rather than leading large-scale AI product strategy.
